The most common herbal preparations made with Bellis perennis include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which are often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and inflammatory disorders.
taxonomy: Crucifera bellidoides is classified within the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as mustard or cabbage family.
